examples.english: To succeed, one must forge a path even when challenges arise.

He is making his abode in the midst of them; in the main body of them:

(K, TA:) originally meaning he is making his abode among them for the purpose of seeking aid of them and staying himself upon them: as though it meant that the back of one of them was before him, and that of another behind him, so that he was defended in either direction: afterwards, by reason of frequency of usage, it came to be employed to signify abiding among a people absolutely.
